narration.text: Every panel has x, y and z.
Near objects grow and pass the lens.

segments.label: Depth Grid
segments.code:
function projectPoint(x,y,z,ctx){const cam=ctx.camera||{x:0,y:0,z:0,fov:760,effectiveZoom:1};const fov=cam.fov||760;const dz=z-(cam.z||0);const scale=fov/Math.max(40,fov+dz);return{x:ctx.width/2+(x-(cam.x||0))*scale,y:ctx.height/2+(y-(cam.y||0))*scale,scale,depth:dz};}
function render(t,ctx){const{ctx:g,width:w,height:h,progress:p}=ctx;const colors=(ctx.theme&&ctx.theme.colors)||{bg:'#05070b',text:'#f7f1df',muted:'#9fb6c9',blue:'#79d9ff',green:'#7bd88f',orange:'#f2aa4c',red:'#ff5c8a',violet:'#c7a6ff'};const cam=ctx.camera||{x:0,y:0,z:0,effectiveZoom:1};g.fillStyle=colors.bg;g.fillRect(0,0,w,h);g.save();g.translate(w/2,h/2);const horizon=0;g.strokeStyle='rgba(121,217,255,.15)';g.lineWidth=1;for(let x=-900;x<=900;x+=100){const a=projectPoint(x,260,80,ctx);const b=projectPoint(x,260,2300,ctx);g.beginPath();g.moveTo(a.x-w/2,a.y-h/2);g.lineTo(b.x-w/2,b.y-h/2);g.stroke();}for(let z=100;z<=2300;z+=140){const left=projectPoint(-900,260,z,ctx);const right=projectPoint(900,260,z,ctx);const alpha=Math.max(.05,Math.min(.5,left.scale*.22));g.strokeStyle='rgba(123,216,143,'+alpha+')';g.beginPath();g.moveTo(left.x-w/2,left.y-h/2);g.lineTo(right.x-w/2,right.y-h/2);g.stroke();}for(let z=120;z<=2100;z+=180){const r=projectPoint(0,0,z,ctx);g.strokeStyle='rgba(242,170,76,'+Math.min(.55,r.scale*.25)+')';g.beginPath();g.ellipse(0,horizon,r.scale*360,r.scale*120,0,0,Math.PI*2);g.stroke();}g.restore();g.textAlign='left';g.fillStyle=colors.text;g.font='900 54px Arial';g.fillText('2D Canvas, Real XYZ Projection',56,72);g.fillStyle=colors.muted;g.font='22px Arial';g.fillText('camera.z moves forward while every point is projected with fov / (fov + depth)',58,108);g.font='18px Arial';g.fillText('camera: x='+(cam.x||0).toFixed(0)+' y='+(cam.y||0).toFixed(0)+' z='+(cam.z||0).toFixed(0)+' effectiveZoom='+(cam.effectiveZoom||1).toFixed(2),58,650);}

segments.label: Floating Panels
Fly Through
segments.code:
function P(x,y,z,ctx){const cam=ctx.camera;const fov=cam.fov||760;const dz=z-cam.z;const s=fov/Math.max(36,fov+dz);return{x:ctx.width/2+(x-cam.x)*s,y:ctx.height/2+(y-cam.y)*s,s,depth:dz};}
function render(t,ctx){const{ctx:g,width:w,height:h,progress:p}=ctx;const c=(ctx.theme&&ctx.theme.colors)||{bg:'#05070b',text:'#f7f1df',muted:'#9fb6c9',blue:'#79d9ff',green:'#7bd88f',orange:'#f2aa4c',red:'#ff5c8a',violet:'#c7a6ff'};g.fillStyle='#05070b';g.fillRect(0,0,w,h);g.globalCompositeOperation='lighter';for(let i=0;i<160;i++){const lane=i%8;const z=200+(i*95+t*260)%2600;const angle=lane/8*Math.PI*2+i*.037;const radius=360+Math.sin(i*.4)*90;const point=P(Math.cos(angle)*radius,Math.sin(angle)*radius*.55,z,ctx);if(point.depth<20||point.depth>2600)continue;const alpha=Math.min(.85,point.s*.5);g.globalAlpha=alpha;g.fillStyle=[c.blue,c.green,c.orange,c.red,c.violet][i%5];g.beginPath();g.arc(point.x,point.y,Math.max(1.5,8*point.s),0,Math.PI*2);g.fill();if(point.s>.45){g.strokeStyle=g.fillStyle;g.lineWidth=2;g.beginPath();g.moveTo(w/2,h/2);g.lineTo(point.x,point.y);g.stroke();}}g.globalCompositeOperation='source-over';g.globalAlpha=1;for(let z=100;z<2500;z+=220){const a=P(-520,-220,z,ctx);const b=P(520,220,z,ctx);g.strokeStyle='rgba(121,217,255,'+Math.min(.4,a.s*.2)+')';g.strokeRect(a.x,a.y,b.x-a.x,b.y-a.y);}g.textAlign='left';g.fillStyle=c.text;g.font='900 46px Arial';g.fillText('Camera Fly-Through',56,66);g.fillStyle=c.muted;g.font='20px Arial';g.fillText('particles rush past because z depth changes their projected scale and velocity',58,100);}

segments.label: Near Pass
segments.code:
function P(x,y,z,ctx){const cam=ctx.camera;const fov=cam.fov||760;const dz=z-cam.z;const s=fov/Math.max(34,fov+dz);return{x:ctx.width/2+(x-cam.x)*s,y:ctx.height/2+(y-cam.y)*s,s,depth:dz};}
function render(t,ctx){const{ctx:g,width:w,height:h,progress:p}=ctx;const c=(ctx.theme&&ctx.theme.colors)||{bg:'#05070b',text:'#f7f1df',muted:'#9fb6c9',blue:'#79d9ff',green:'#7bd88f',orange:'#f2aa4c',red:'#ff5c8a',violet:'#c7a6ff'};g.fillStyle='#090712';g.fillRect(0,0,w,h);const cards=[[-420,-120,1450,'BACK LAYER',c.blue],[-120,90,1650,'MID LAYER',c.green],[260,-80,1880,'FRONT LAYER',c.orange],[0,0,2050,'PASSING LENS',c.red]];cards.sort((a,b)=>b[2]-a[2]);for(const card of cards){const q=P(card[0],card[1],card[2],ctx);g.save();g.translate(q.x,q.y);g.scale(q.s,q.s);const alpha=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,q.s*.75));g.globalAlpha=alpha;g.fillStyle='rgba(18,24,38,.96)';g.beginPath();g.roundRect(-180,-76,360,152,18);g.fill();g.strokeStyle=card[4];g.lineWidth=4;g.stroke();g.fillStyle=card[4];g.font='900 30px Arial';g.textAlign='center';g.fillText(card[3],0,-10);g.fillStyle='#f7f1df';g.font='18px Arial';g.fillText('z='+card[2]+'  depth=' + Math.round(q.depth),0,30);g.restore();}const rulerX=80;g.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.2)';g.beginPath();g.moveTo(rulerX,140);g.lineTo(rulerX,620);g.stroke();for(let i=0;i<=8;i++){const z=ctx.camera.z+i*250;const y=140+i*60;g.fillStyle=i===0?c.red:c.muted;g.fillRect(rulerX-8,y,16,2);g.font='13px Arial';g.fillText('z '+Math.round(z),rulerX+18,y+5);}g.textAlign='center';g.fillStyle=c.text;g.font='900 50px Arial';g.fillText('Near Objects Grow And Pass Camera',w/2,68);g.fillStyle=c.muted;g.font='20px Arial';g.fillText('this is still 2D canvas, but every UI card is projected from xyz space',w/2,104);}
